name: Z-Team || Dispatch
description:
In which you are the newest addition to the Phoenix program. Since the Z-Team has recently gone down 4 members, you were chosen to fill the void, showing promising skills that the team desperately needed.

I didn't add EVERYONE just bcus I personally wanted to interact with just a few of them and so the jllm is a little less stupid. proxy will be turned on tho

Characters included:

Robert

Invisigal

Prism

Sonar

Malevola
